name: nat-vent-outdoor-rises-above-indoor-exit
description: Nat vent active; outdoor rises above indoor — new directional exit fires before threshold is crossed

verdict.summary: When outdoor warms above indoor during active nat vent, exits to pause even if still below threshold

events.note: evening: outdoor well below indoor — nat vent eligible
outdoor has risen just above indoor (74.5F > 74.0F); still below threshold 75F — directional exit fires before threshold exit would

assertions.reason: outdoor 70F < indoor 76F and below threshold 75F — nat vent activates
outdoor 74.5F >= indoor 74.0F — directional exit fires; outdoor still below threshold 75F but airflow no longer beneficial
